entries.text: Enhances melee attack power of weapons
Enhances attack power of dash attacks
Enhances attack power of attacks executed after rolling or backstepping
奥義の自動チャージ速度が向上する
Charge attacks produce ice storm. Weapon coated with frost.
Charge attacks produce black flames. Weapon coated with black flame.
Charge attacks produce a golden shockwave. Weapon coated with holy.
Charge attacks produce magma. Weapon coated with fire.
Charge attacks produce a bolt of lightning. Weapon coated with lightning.
Charge attacks release sleep-inducing mist. Weapon coated with sleep.
Continued guarding gradually enhances potency of sorceries and incantations and casting speed
The Scholar's grief enhances intelligence and arcane
The Undertaker's grief enhances strength and faith
